meta.description: Timing windows, signal thresholds, and competitive dynamics per source channel. The filter does not change per channel — the standard never does. This file captures what makes each channel distinct operationally.

asian_viral.label: Asian Viral Platforms
asian_viral.signal_type: Mass emotional response at scale — millions stopped scrolling
asian_viral.description: Product went viral with a real Chinese or Korean audience before any import or awareness reached Egypt. The like count proves AHA. The 1688 supplier count proves manufacturing demand.

chinese_timing_clock.description: Use 1688 supplier count as the timing signal for Chinese-origin candidates

thresholds.action: Hold. Monitor weekly. Manufacturing demand not confirmed.
Sweet spot. Window open. Act with urgency.
Check AliExpress English listings immediately. Still possible but urgent.
Import wave starting. Do not proceed.

korean_advantage.wtp_premium: 20–30% higher for products reading as Korean-origin with Egyptian youth 15–28
korean_advantage.competition: Near zero — almost no other Egyptian scanner watches Korean domestic platforms

verification_sequence: Screenshot immediately when you stop scrolling
Check 1688 supplier count (Chinese) or Coupang rank movement (Korean)
If all clean — advance to filter

concept_mines.label: Validated Concept Mines (Crowdfunding)
concept_mines.signal_type: Strangers paid real money before the product existed — highest external demand proof
concept_mines.description: Financial commitment from real buyers is a stronger AHA signal than any like count. The product often never reaches Egypt at all — Kickstarter campaigns frequently have no Middle East distribution.

signal_thresholds.note: Higher bar for Indiegogo — flexible funding means campaigns reach goal without full demand validation

time_windows.action: Strongest signal. Proceed immediately. No supply exists anywhere on earth.

time_windows.status: Funded, shipping to backers (6–18 months ago)
time_windows.action: Strong signal. Verify Egyptian market — often still clean.
Check Amazon and Egyptian market. May have reached mass distribution.

time_windows.status: Funded 3+ years ago, no Amazon presence
time_windows.action: Still viable. Verify carefully before committing.

kill_signals_specific: Raised $1M+ AND featured in Wired/TechCrunch/Verge — likely heading to mass market
Core innovation is patented mechanism — cannot replicate
Already on Amazon with 1,000+ reviews — window closed

concept_libraries.label: Concept Libraries
concept_libraries.signal_type: Designed or desired but never manufactured — designer or user validated the AHA
concept_libraries.egypt_pipeline: Unlimited — product may never be manufactured anywhere. You are first manufacturer on earth.
concept_libraries.description: No external demand proven by money — AHA comes from your judgment and the design community's engagement. The pre-sell step is more critical here. Products that pass filter AND pre-sell here face zero global competition.

signal_by_platform.yanko_core77: Engagement (saves, comments, shares) from design community = AHA validated by people who make things
signal_by_platform.behance: 1,000+ appreciations on a simple physical product design = widespread designer AHA
signal_by_platform.r_somebodymakethis: 500+ upvotes = global unmet need stated directly in plain language. Sort by Top All Time for highest-validated.
signal_by_platform.pinterest: Same concept appearing in 50+ boards from different users = persistent visual desire that nobody has solved
signal_by_platform.github_design_files: 100+ stars on a design file = other makers found it valuable. Often ready-to-produce SVG/DXF.

concept_libraries.validation_burden: Higher than other channels. AHA comes from your judgment, not from external financial commitment. Pre-sell step weight is maximum here.

ai_ideation.label: AI Ideation
ai_ideation.signal_type: Originated — no external reference anywhere on earth
ai_ideation.egypt_pipeline: None. You set the clock entirely.
ai_ideation.description: The product does not exist anywhere. No AliExpress listing coming. No import wave. The copycat must reverse-engineer your physical product — not a 1688 schematic shared with 40 competitors simultaneously.

competitive_dynamics.copycat_source: Your physical product only — not a global schematic
competitive_dynamics.defense: Iteration speed — evolve product faster than they can copy it
competitive_dynamics.validation_weight: Pre-sell step is the ONLY validation. No external signal exists. 2 shop deposits = confirmation.

ai_tool_matrix.claude: Primary. Full constraint set embedded. Egyptian market knowledge. No re-explaining needed.
ai_tool_matrix.qwen: Second opinion. Stronger Chinese manufacturing context. Cross-reference with Claude.
ai_tool_matrix.perplexity: Real-time web signal. Use for: what's trending on Douyin now / top r/somebodymakethis posts this month.
ai_tool_matrix.chatgpt: Third opinion. Run same prompt, compare outputs. Convergence = stronger signal.
ai_tool_matrix.gemini: Search gap signal. What do people search for in [category] but cannot find?
ai_tool_matrix.notebooklm: Pattern recognition ONLY. Feed failure log. Ask what product type to stop scanning.

ai_ideation.prompt_rule: The tighter the buyer description and pain description — the better the output. 'Cairo mother of 3 in 75sqm managing 3 school bags at the entrance' beats 'Egyptian mother' entirely.

github_intelligence.label: GitHub Intelligence Layer
github_intelligence.signal_type: Design files, research repos, awesome lists, trend analysis outputs
github_intelligence.egypt_pipeline: Unlimited — no manufacturing exists, often no commercial interest anywhere
github_intelligence.description: Every public repository is readable in a browser with no account or technical knowledge. GitHub is an intelligence layer containing design files ready for Egyptian workshop production, product research nobody else is reading, and curated lists of scanning sources.

primary_uses.value: Ready-to-produce files. Hand to Egyptian laser cutting workshop same day.

primary_uses.search: awesome product design / awesome industrial design / awesome laser cutting
primary_uses.value: Community-curated directories of every scanning platform you haven't found yet

primary_uses.search: trending products scraper results / aliexpress trending products list
primary_uses.value: Read the output files — no code needed. Products you may not have seen on Douyin.
Researchers publish gap analyses. You have the manufacturing path they don't.

star_signal.100_plus: Designer-validated — hundreds of people found it valuable

search_operators.stars: stars:>N — only repos with more than N stars
search_operators.language: language:markdown — only repos where main files are docs/lists

source_hierarchy.description: Signal confidence ranking. The pre-sell deposit from 2+ shop owners equates all sources — this ranking guides where to focus scanning time, not which candidates to advance.

ranked.reason: Strangers paid real money before product existed
Mass emotional response + manufacturing demand confirmed
Global unmet need stated directly in plain language
No external validation — pre-sell is the only confirmation
Proven demand in Korean market — needs Egyptian fit check
Designer-validated, producible immediately if concept fits

source_hierarchy.equalizer: The pre-sell deposit from 2+ shop owners overrides every rank. A rank-5 AI ideation candidate with 2 deposits beats a rank-1 Kickstarter candidate with 0 deposits.
